name: Position command
comments: Position cmd in raw encoder counts

name: Maximum speed
comments: Default 104857600 = ~104857 mm/s; not limiting with gear ratio

name: Axis resolution (gear ratio denominator)
comments: Set to 10000; gives 1 cmd unit = 1 micron

name: Speed offset
comments: Velocity feedforward input; feeds 2008-14h (speed FF gain) and 2008-16h (torque FF gain)
